translations.landing.llms.title: Flyto2
translations.landing.llms.summary: Browser automation at machine speed. Record once, replay instantly. No API needed — works on any website. Batch operations, page monitoring, time-sensitive tasks.
translations.landing.llms.description: Flyto2 is an automation tool that lets you record browser actions and replay them without coding. It works on Mac, Windows, and Linux. You can pause, verify, and resume at any step — always staying in control.
translations.landing.llms.pages.home: Overview of Flyto2 browser automation platform
translations.landing.llms.pages.pricing: Plans and pricing — free, pro, and enterprise
translations.landing.llms.pages.download: Download Flyto2 for Mac, Windows, or Linux
translations.landing.llms.pages.templates: Pre-built automation templates for common tasks
translations.landing.llms.features.record: Record & replay browser actions — no coding required
translations.landing.llms.features.pause: Pause, check, and resume at any step
translations.landing.llms.features.apps: Works with websites, desktop apps, and file operations
translations.landing.llms.features.platforms: Available on Mac, Windows, and Linux
